_comment: Metadata-only tracker for credential expirations. NEVER store secret values here — only names, dates, and where the secret actually lives. Checked by scripts/check-secrets-expiry.mjs (npm run check:secrets).

secrets.name: Supabase access token — Gorilla-Labs project (MCP / Management API)
secrets.storedIn: Out of repo. Belongs in C:/Users/walfr/.claude.json (MCP config) or a shell env var. NOT committed.
secrets.note: Token was pasted in chat once on 2026-05-27 — treat as exposed and rotate ASAP, do not wait for expiry.
